description: Top-level tab strip container. Holds crt.TabContainer items and controls tab switching.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the panel to its content height when true.

stretch.description: Stretches the panel to fill available vertical space.

description: Single tab within a TabPanel. Contains child elements shown when the tab is active.

caption.description: Tab header text. Use #ResourceString(key)# for custom captions.

items.description: Child view elements rendered inside the tab body.

iconPosition.description: Header layout for icon and caption.

description: Grid-based layout container with explicit rows, columns, gap, and child layoutConfig placement.

items.description: Child items placed by layoutConfig coordinates.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the container height to its content when true.

stretch.description: Stretches the container to available space when true.

description: Flexbox layout container for vertical or horizontal grouping of child elements.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the container to its content when true.

description: Header layout container commonly used for page title, actions, and compact summary content.

items.description: Header child elements such as labels, buttons, and badges.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the header height to its content when true.

description: Collapsible container with header, title, tools area, and nested items content.

title.description: Header caption. Use #ResourceString(key)# for custom titles.

items.description: Content items shown inside the panel.

tools.description: Header tool items rendered near the toggle icon.

fullWidthHeader.description: Expands the header to the full panel width when true.

description: Container for switching between tab-like or segmented content blocks while keeping a single active branch visible.

items.description: Toggle options or child content items.

selectedValue.description: Currently selected toggle key or binding.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the container to content when true.

description: Generic text input for short, medium, or multiline text values.

tools.description: Optional trailing tool elements rendered in the tools slot.

inputType.description: Native input mode such as text, password, or search.

displayTools.description: Overrides the automatic tool visibility logic when set.

description: Numeric input for integer, decimal, money, and other number-like values.
Boolean input rendered as a checkbox.

inversed.description: Inverts the visual boolean meaning when true.

description: Date, time, or datetime picker bound to a page attribute.

pickerType.description: Picker mode matching the real field kind.

description: Lookup or selection field with optional add-record and list actions.

isAddAllowed.description: Shows the add-record behavior when supported.

showValueAsLink.description: Renders selected lookup values as links when supported.

controlActions.description: Inline actions rendered near the field.

description: Rich text editor for large formatted text values.

needHandleSave.description: Enables save handling for embedded assets.

filesStorage.description: Optional file storage config for uploads and embeds.

description: Phone-specific text input with frontend preprocessing for phone links.

needHandleSave.description: Phone input usually does not need explicit save handling.

description: Email-specific text input with frontend email validation behavior.

needHandleSave.description: Email input usually does not need explicit save handling.

description: URL-aware text input commonly used for web links.

needHandleSave.description: Web input usually does not need explicit save handling.

description: Color picker for hex or palette-based color selection.
Image uploader and preview control. Binds through the value property, not control.
File picker and uploader for binary attachments.

accept.description: Accepted MIME types or file extensions.

description: Masked secure input for secrets and encrypted values.
Slider control for bounded numeric values.
Clickable action element for requests, navigation, menus, and page commands.

caption.description: Button text. Use #ResourceString(key)# for custom captions.

clickMode.description: Regular click or menu button behavior.

menuItems.description: Nested menu entries used when clickMode is menu or when the button exposes a dropdown.

description: Tabular list component for ListPage records and inline grid actions.

items.description: Bound collection attribute, usually $DataTable_Items or a similar list.

features.description: Grid features such as row selection, toolbar, or edit mode.

headerToolbarItems.description: Header menu items rendered in the grid toolbar.

bulkActions.description: Menu actions available for multi-selection scenarios.

placeholder.description: Placeholder content slot rendered when the grid has no records.

skeleton.description: Skeleton content slot rendered while the grid is loading.

primaryColumnName.description: Primary key column code used by the grid.

activeRow.description: Optional binding for the selected row.

title.description: Optional grid caption rendered above the table.

stretch.description: Stretches the grid to fill available height.

maxHeight.description: Maximum rendered height when the grid is scrollable.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the grid height to visible rows when true.

description: Approval widget that renders current approval state, metrics, and next-step content.

items.description: Nested content rendered in the approval items slot.

recordId.description: Record identifier that drives approval loading.

dataLoaded.description: Frontend flag that turns off the loading state when approval data is ready.

approval.description: Current approval payload bound from the view model.

approvalsMetrics.description: Aggregated approval counters used for visibility and badges.

approvalChangedHandler.description: Binding that reacts to approval status changes.

hiddenWhenNoData.description: Hides the widget when there is no approval data.

linkedSchemaName.description: Optional linked schema used by approval actions.

linkedSchemaColumnName.description: Optional linked schema column used by approval actions.

activeColor.description: Accent color for active approval items.

description: Calendar and scheduler component with tile templates, filtration support, and date-range navigation.

filters.description: Date-range filters that define the current calendar window.

tileContent.description: Lazy child template content rendered inside calendar tiles.

pageSize.description: Number of items loaded per page.

useAutoScrollToCurrentTime.description: Auto-scrolls to the current time in time-grid views.

maxDuplicatesByOwner.description: Maximum duplicate items allowed for the same owner bucket.

miniPageSchemaName.description: Mini page schema opened from calendar interactions.

lightweightModeLimit.description: Threshold for switching the calendar into lightweight mode.

description: Chat container that hosts conversation content and switches between split and combined layouts.

items.description: Nested chat content, usually a crt.Conversation tree.

combinedModeEnabled.description: Enables switching between split and combined layouts.

combinedModeButtonVisible.description: Controls visibility of the combined-mode toggle button.

description: Conversation surface with actions, tools, typing indicators, pagination, and placeholder content slots.

actions.description: Child elements rendered in the actions slot.

information.description: Child elements rendered in the information slot.

typing.description: Child elements rendered in the typing slot.

tools.description: Child elements rendered in the tools slot, usually the message editor.

placeholder.description: Child elements rendered when there are no messages.

previewMessageId.description: Message identifier currently highlighted in preview mode.

hasPreviousMessages.description: Indicates whether older messages can be paged in.

searchFilter.description: Text filter applied to the message list.

isEmbeddedMode.description: Embeds the conversation in a more compact shell.

paginationPageSize.description: Number of messages requested per pagination step.

disableAutoScroll.description: Disables automatic scrolling to new content.

description: Record or user feed with post composer support, selection actions, and incremental message loading.

selectionActions.description: Menu items rendered for selected text or feed actions.

feedType.description: Feed source mode such as Record or User.

primaryDisplayColumnValue.description: Optional display value for the current record.

cardState.description: Card action state that controls composer visibility.

allowExternalPost.description: Allows posting to external destinations when supported.

offsetDate.description: Pagination cursor for older feed messages.

sortColumn.description: Current sort column for feed ordering.

showBlankSlate.description: Shows blank-state content when there are no posts.

isReadOnly.description: Disables feed editing and composer interactions.

description: Gallery list component with selectable cards, pagination events, and bulk menu actions.

ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the gallery container.

bulkActions.description: Menu items available for bulk selection actions.

itemStyles.description: Inline style overrides for gallery items.

multiselect.description: Allows multiple gallery items to be selected.

selectionState.description: Selection model payload for specific or bulk selection.

description: Nested menu action item used by button menus, grid toolbars, bulk actions, and similar action collections.

iconColor.description: Icon palette name or custom color.

selected.description: Marks the menu item as selected when supported.

clicked.description: Request descriptor triggered when the menu item is invoked.

description: Agent inbox alias of crt.Chat that hosts multi-channel items and planned tasks in the same shell.

items.description: Nested inbox content, usually a crt.Conversation tree.

combinedModeEnabled.description: Enables switching between split and combined layouts.

combinedModeButtonVisible.description: Controls visibility of the combined-mode toggle button.

description: Action shown in a ComboBox dropdown, usually for create-record or custom lookup actions.

code.description: Stable action code within the dropdown.

caption.description: Action caption. Use #ResourceString(key)# for custom captions.

clicked.description: Request descriptor triggered when the action is selected.

description: Document preview surface that loads a file and syncs viewer options back to the page model.

file.description: File descriptor passed to the viewer instance.

options.description: Viewer options forwarded to the file viewer implementation.

description: Visual separator used inside menu collections.
Read-only label used to group related menu actions.
Responsive summary strip that renders crt.SummaryItem entries and optional action menus.

items.description: Summary items filtered to crt.SummaryItem entries.

actions.description: Menu items rendered in the summaries action menu.

readonly.description: Propagates readonly behavior to summary items.

description: Single summary chip with label, value or error state, and optional menu actions.

value.description: Summary value shown when there is no error.

error.description: Error text shown instead of the value.

actions.description: Menu items available for the summary item.

readonly.description: Disables summary item actions when true.

description: Read-only text label for headings, captions, and inline explanatory copy.

labelColor.description: Text color token or explicit color.

headingLevel.description: Semantic heading level or label marker.

description: Embedded chart widget for bar, line, pie, doughnut, area, spline, scatter, horizontal-bar, funnel, and waterfall charts. Configured via a series-based data model with entity schema aggregation.

config.description: ChartWidgetConfig object containing title, color, theme, scales, series, and seriesOrder.

config.title.description: Chart title displayed in the widget header. Supports #ResourceString(key)# macro.

config.color.description: Accent color for the widget. WidgetColor enum values: "green", "blue", "red", "coral", "orange", "violet", "purple", "navy-blue", "dark-blue", "light-blue", "celestial-blue", "steel-blue", "dark-turquoise", "turquoise", "forest-green", "dark-green", "light-green", "bright-red", "cadmium-red", "orange-red", "burnt-coral", "rusty-orange", "vivid-purple".

config.scales.description: Scale configuration. Properties: stacked (boolean, default false), xAxis ({ name, formatting }), yAxis ({ name, formatting }), color (string). All properties are optional.

config.scales.stacked.description: When true, series are rendered as stacked.

config.scales.xAxis.description: X axis config: { name?: string, formatting?: StringFormat | NumberFormat }.

config.scales.yAxis.description: Y axis config: { name?: string, formatting?: StringFormat | NumberFormat | DateTimeFormat }.

config.series.description: Array of SeriesConfig objects. Each series defines type, color, label, legend, data, dataLabel, and border.

config.series[].color.description: Series color from the WidgetColor enum. Do not reuse the same color for different series.

config.series[].label.description: Series label displayed in the chart legend and popup. Supports #ResourceString(key)# macro.

config.series[].dataLabel.description: Optional data label rendering config for the series.

config.series[].border.description: Optional border style config for the series.

config.series[].data.description: WidgetDataConfig wrapping providing and formatting: { providing: SeriesDataProvidingConfig, formatting: NumberFormat | DateTimeFormat | StringFormat }.

config.series[].data.providing.schemaNam.description: Entity schema name to query data from (e.g. "Activity", "Contact").

config.series[].data.providing.attribute.description: View model attribute name for the series data. Required for the data-source loading path (when DisableSupportWidgetDataSource feature is off). Use a unique name per series, e.g. "MyChart_Series_0".

config.series[].data.providing.rowCount.description: Maximum number of rows to fetch.

config.series[].data.providing.grouping.description: Grouping config. Two types: (1) by-value: { type: "by-value", column: { expression: { expressionType: 0, columnPath: "<Column.Name>" } } }; (2) by-date-part: { type: "by-date-part", column: DatePartFunctionColumn[] }. expressionType: 0=Column, 1=Function.

config.series[].data.providing.aggregati.description: Aggregation config: { column: AggregationFunctionColumn }. column.expression must include: expressionType (1=Function), functionType (2=Aggregation), aggregationType (0=None, 1=Count, 2=Sum, 3=Avg, 4=Min, 5=Max), aggregationEvalType (0=None, 1=All, 2=Distinct), functionArgument: { expressionType: 0, columnPath: "<column>" }.

config.series[].data.providing.filters.description: Optional filter config: { filter: IFilterGroup, filterAttributes?: [] }.

config.series[].data.providing.sectionBi.description: Optional section binding: { path: string, rootSchemaPrimaryColumnValue?: string }.

config.series[].data.formatting.description: Number/date/string formatting for the series values: { type: "number", decimalPrecision: 0, decimalSeparator: ".", thousandSeparator: "," }.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 6 for readable chart height (8 recommended).

notes: Use rowSpan >= 6 in layoutConfig for readable chart height. ChartType enum values from frontend: "bar", "line", "pie", "doughnut", "area", "spline", "scatter", "horizontal-bar", "tsfunnel", "waterfall". WidgetTheme enum: "full-fill", "without-fill", "partial-fill", "glassmorphism", "transparent". Grouping type "by-value" uses an EntityQueryColumn; "by-date-part" uses DatePartFunctionColumn[]. The data.providing structure extends WidgetDataProvidingConfig with rowCount and grouping fields.

description: Single-value indicator widget showing a count, sum, average, or other aggregate from an entity schema. Displays a formatted metric with optional label, icon, and drill-down.

config.description: IndicatorWidgetConfig object containing title, theme, data, text, and layout.

config.title.description: Indicator title displayed in the widget header. Supports #ResourceString(key)# macro.

config.data.providing.schemaName.description: Entity schema name to aggregate data from (e.g. "Contact", "Account").

config.data.providing.attribute.description: Attribute in the schema to provide data for.

config.data.providing.aggregation.description: Aggregation config: { column: AggregationFunctionColumn }. Same model as ChartWidget.

config.data.formatting.description: Format config for the metric value. NumberFormat: { type: "number", decimalPrecision: 0, decimalSeparator: ".", thousandSeparator: "," }. Also supports DateTimeFormat and StringFormat.

config.text.description: Text display config: { template: "{0}", metricMacros: "{0}", fontSizeMode: "extra-small" | "small" | "medium" | "large" | "extra-large", labelPosition: "above-under" | "before-after", color?: WidgetColor }.

config.layout.description: Indicator layout config: { color: WidgetColor | "transparent", icon?: { iconName: string, color?: WidgetColor | "white" } }.

config.hideTitle.description: When true, hides the widget title.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan 2-4 for indicators.

description: Gauge (speedometer) widget showing a single aggregated metric on a semicircular scale with configurable min/max range and color-coded thresholds.

config.description: GaugeWidgetConfig object. Extends IndicatorWidgetConfig with min, max, thresholds, and color.

config.min.description: Minimum value on the gauge scale.

config.max.description: Maximum value on the gauge scale.

config.thresholds.description: Color-coded threshold zones. Keys are numeric threshold start values (as strings), values are { color: string }. Example: { "0": { "color": "green" }, "50": { "color": "yellow" }, "80": { "color": "red" } }.

config.color.description: Widget accent color from WidgetColor enum.

config.data.description: Same as IndicatorWidgetConfig.data: { providing: WidgetDataProvidingConfig, formatting: NumberFormat | DateTimeFormat | StringFormat }.

config.data.providing.schemaName.description: Entity schema name to aggregate data from.

config.data.formatting.description: Number formatting: { type: "number", decimalPrecision: 0, decimalSeparator: ".", thousandSeparator: "," }.

config.text.description: Text display config (inherited from IndicatorWidget): { template: "{0}", metricMacros?: "{0}", fontSizeMode?: "medium", labelPosition?: "above-under" }.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan 4-6 for adequate gauge height.

notes: GaugeWidget extends IndicatorWidgetConfig. The thresholds object maps numeric start values to colors — the gauge arc is painted with the color of the highest threshold that the metric has passed. config.min and config.max define the gauge range; the metric value is clamped to this range.

description: Tabular list widget that embeds a data grid inside a widget frame with header, full-screen mode, and toolbar. Extends crt.DataGrid with widget chrome (title, theme, color).

widgetConfig.description: ListWidgetConfig: { theme?: WidgetTheme, layout?: { color?: WidgetColor, border?: WidgetBorderConfig }, showTools?: boolean }.

widgetToolbarItems.description: Toolbar menu items rendered in the widget header.

items.description: Bound collection attribute, same as crt.DataGrid.

features.description: Grid features such as row selection, toolbar, or edit mode.

primaryColumnName.description: Primary key column code used by the grid.

fitContent.description: Shrinks the grid height to visible rows.

placeholder.description: Content slot rendered when the grid has no records.

skeleton.description: Content slot rendered while the grid is loading.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 6 for adequate list height.

notes: ListWidget extends the DataGrid component with a widget wrapper (header, theme, full-screen). It has contentSlots 'placeholder' and 'skeleton'. The widgetConfig input is separate from the DataGrid properties — both must be provided.

description: Pipeline funnel widget for visualizing entity stage progression (e.g. Opportunity stages). Shows count, stage conversion, and conversion-to-first-stage views. Requires the Opportunity package.

config.description: FunnelWidgetConfig extending WidgetConfig with entities array.

config.color.description: Widget accent color from WidgetColor enum.

config.entities.description: Array of FunnelEntityConfiguration objects defining the pipeline stages. Each entity: { schemaName: string, calculatedOperations: [{ operation: string, targetColumnName: string }], connectedWith: { type: number, schemaName, connectionSchemaName, parentSchemaColumnName, childSchemaColumnName } | null, filters: FilterGroup }.

funnelTypeList.description: Funnel display modes. Default: [{ label, type: 0 (ByCount) }, { label, type: 2 (StageConversion) }, { label, type: 1 (ToFirstStage) }].

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 8 for adequate funnel height.

notes: FunnelWidget uses a tsfunnel chart type internally. The entities array defines the funnel stages — typically one entity (e.g. Opportunity) with calculatedOperations for the metric. Requires the Opportunity package to be installed. The connectedWith property links stages across entities (e.g. Lead → Opportunity). FunnelSliceType enum: 0 = ByCount, 1 = ToFirstStage, 2 = StageConversion.

description: Full pipeline funnel widget for multi-entity pipelines (e.g. Lead → Opportunity). Extends FunnelWidget with a legend panel and cross-entity connection visualization. Requires the Opportunity package.

config.description: FunnelWidgetConfig with entities array. Same model as crt.FunnelWidget but typically with multiple connected entities.

config.color.description: Widget accent color from WidgetColor enum.

config.entities.description: Array of FunnelEntityConfiguration objects. For a full pipeline, typically includes Lead and Opportunity with connectedWith linking them.

toolbarMenuItems.description: Toolbar menu items rendered in the widget header.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 8 for adequate pipeline height.

notes: FullPipelineWidget shows a multi-stage funnel with a legend panel. Use connectedWith to link entities: { type: 0, schemaName: "Lead", connectionSchemaName: "Lead", parentSchemaColumnName: "Opportunity", childSchemaColumnName: "Id" }. Requires the Opportunity package.

description: Sales waterfall widget showing cumulative pipeline changes as a waterfall chart with start and end metric values. Uses series-based data providing with grouping and aggregation. Requires the CrtWaterfallPipeline package.

config.description: SalesWaterfallWidgetConfig extending WaterfallPipelineWidgetConfig. Includes title, theme, color, data, stages, startValueColumn, endValueColumn, and layout.

config.color.description: Widget accent color from WidgetColor enum.

config.data.description: SalesWaterfallPipelineDataConfig: { providing: SeriesDataProvidingConfig (with schemaName, aggregation, grouping, filters, rowCount), designOptions?: { filterOptions?: Record<string, string> } }.

config.data.providing.schemaName.description: Entity schema name for waterfall data.

config.data.providing.grouping.description: Grouping config (by-value or by-date-part), same as ChartWidget.

config.stages.description: Array of WaterfallStageConfig: { id: string, color?: WidgetColor, index?: number, valueOrientation?: WaterfallValueOrientation }.

config.startValueColumn.description: Column name for the waterfall start value.

config.endValueColumn.description: Column name for the waterfall end value.

startValue.description: Start metric: { amount: number, name: string, date: Date }. Displayed before the waterfall chart.

endValue.description: End metric: { amount: number, name: string, date: Date }. Displayed after the waterfall chart.

seriesData.description: Series data array with cumulative values for the waterfall bars.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 6 for adequate waterfall height.

notes: SalesWaterfallWidget requires the CrtWaterfallPipeline package. The widget shows start/end metrics as summary cards alongside the waterfall chart. config.stages defines individual waterfall bars with optional colors. The designOptions.filterOptions are converted to filters at runtime by the metadata generator.

description: Configurable quick filter component for list pages. Supports lookup, date range, checkbox, and custom filter types.

filterType.description: QuickFilterType enum value defining the filter behavior.

config.description: BaseQuickFilterConfig with filter-specific settings including caption.

description: Full-text search filter with optional column-specific search, icon-only mode, and instant search support.

iconOnly.description: Render as icon button that expands on click.

instant.description: Apply filter on every keystroke instead of on Enter.

minifySearch.description: Animate between minified and expanded states.

selectedColumnsGroups.description: SearchFilteredColumnsGroup[] — column groups for targeted search.

description: Hierarchical folder tree for filtering records by dynamic and static folders with favorites support.

sourceSchemaName.description: Entity schema name for folder data source.

favoriteItems.description: DataItem[] | BaseViewModelCollection of favorite folder nodes.

activeFolderId.description: Guid binding for the currently selected folder.

expandedItems.description: Guid[] of expanded folder node IDs.

description: Companion action bar for FolderTree, showing active folder name and folder management controls.

folderTree.description: Reference to the associated FolderTree element name.

activeFolderId.description: Guid binding for the active folder.

activeFolderName.description: Display name of the active folder.

description: Container for advanced filter builder UI bound to an entity schema.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for filter column resolution.

description: Hierarchical entity filter tree for catalog-style navigation with specification filters and multi-tab display.
Filter builder data source component providing filter elements for a given entity schema.
Toggle button to show/hide the filter builder panel for a given entity schema.
Timeline component displaying chronological entity activity tiles with filtering and master entity binding.

masterSchemaId.description: Binding to master record ID, typically '$Id'.

masterEntity.description: LookupValue binding for the master entity.

customFilters.description: Content slot for custom filter elements.

description: Individual timeline entry tile displaying entity data with configurable columns and label components.

entity.description: TimelineEntity with id, schemaName, entityId, date, author, columns.

description: Generic text label for timeline tile columns. Base label type for non-specialized data value types.
Timeline label for email-type column values with mailto link rendering.
Timeline label for phone-type column values with tel link rendering.
Timeline label for web/URL-type column values with hyperlink rendering.
Timeline label for lookup column values rendered as clickable navigation links.

value.description: TimelineLookup: { displayValue, href, entityName, recordId, primaryColorValue }.

description: Message composer for creating feed posts with channel selection, external post support, and reply threading.

schemaUId.description: Schema UId for the feed context.

description: Individual feed message item with likes, comments, edit, delete, and reply capabilities.

item.description: FeedMessage with Id, Message, LikeCount, CommentCount, CreatedOn, CreatedBy.

description: Dashboard container that holds selectable dashboard tabs with widget rendering, favorites, and filter integration.

selectedDashboard.description: ID of the currently selected dashboard.

notes: Requires FreedomUIDashboardsEnabled feature flag. Uses PlatformAPIs.Filtration with aggregation support.

description: Next steps gallery component showing upcoming activities and tasks for a record, with configurable tile types and add capability.

tilesMap.description: Record<string, NextStepTileConfig> mapping activity types to tile configurations.

description: Playbook component displaying guided sales process steps with stage-based content.
Communication options panel displaying phone, email, and social media contact details with inline editing.

masterRecordColumnValue.description: Binding to master record column value.

description: Compact account profile card with photo, name, alternative name, country, city, and timezone. Requires CrtCustomer360App package.
notes: Requires CrtCustomer360App package. Has contentSlot 'dialogItems' for custom edit dialog fields.

description: Compact contact profile card with photo, full name fields, birth date, country, city, and timezone. Requires CrtCustomer360App package.
Compact user profile card for system user display with first/middle/last name and photo.
notes: Hidden behind ShowDesignerDemoItems feature flag. Has contentSlot 'dialogItems'.

description: File drop zone container for drag-and-drop file uploads with overlay indicator.
Form business rules engine that applies conditional visibility, required state, and validation rules to page fields.

fields.description: BaseViewModelCollection of form fields to apply rules to.

description: Multi-value lookup selector with chip display, supporting label, placeholder, and required validation.

labelPosition.description: Label position relative to the field.

control.description: Attribute binding for the multi-select value. Use "$<AttributeName>" syntax.

description: Tag selector component for adding/removing entity tags with chip display and color support.

tagInRecordSourceSchemaName.description: Entity schema name for tag-in-record junction table.

control.description: Attribute binding for the tag selection. Use "$<AttributeName>" syntax.

description: Password input field with masked text display and show/hide toggle. Extends crt.Input.
notes: Inherits all properties from crt.Input (control, label, placeholder, readonly, disabled, etc.).

description: Group of mutually exclusive toggle buttons. Container for ButtonToggleGroupItem children.
Dropdown menu container component with configurable position and glassmorphism support.

panelClass.description: CSS class for the overlay panel.

description: Radio button group rendered as icon buttons with row or column layout.

items.description: RadioOption[] with value, label, and icon.

description: Single chip / tag / badge element with configurable color.
List of chip elements with optional wrapping and readonly mode. Experimental component.
Side panel container for right-side content areas with optional resize support.

uniqueName.description: Unique name for sidebar state persistence.

sidebarWidth.description: CSS width value for the sidebar.

description: Collapsible content section within a ToggleContainer, with header toggle and content slots.
Outlet component that renders another Freedom UI schema inline by name. Used for embedding reusable page fragments.

schemaName.description: Name of the Freedom UI schema to render.

description: Stage progress bar for DCM (Dynamic Case Management) entity stages. Shows clickable stage steps with transitions and process schema integration.

recordId.description: Parent record unique identifier binding, typically '$Id'.

saveOnChange.description: Save record automatically on stage change.

askUserToChangeSchema.description: Ask user before changing DCM process schema.

allowedStages.description: DcmStageInfo[] stages the user can click.

description: Hyperlink component with configurable target, caption, underlining mode, and click event support.
Embedded iframe component for loading external URLs or rendering inline HTML content with configurable sandbox and permissions.

urlContent.description: URL to load in iframe. Takes priority over htmlContent.

htmlContent.description: HTML content to render using srcdoc attribute.

layoutConfig.description: Standard grid placement. Use rowSpan >= 6 for adequate height.

notes: Has contentSlots 'items' and 'placeholder'. Use urlContent for external pages, htmlContent for inline content.

description: Badge/notification indicator overlay for child elements with configurable color and offset.

offset.description: BadgeOffset — shifts the badge inside/outside the element.

notes: Has contentSlot 'items' for the element the badge decorates.

description: File/attachment list component with drag-and-drop upload, gallery/list view modes, and file grouping. Extends DataGrid.

masterRecordColumnValue.description: Master record column value binding, typically '$Id'.

description: Rich HTML editor based on CKEditor with macro support, email template integration, and preview capability.

control.description: Form control binding for HTML content, e.g. '$Body'.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for template/macro context.

description: Empty state placeholder with title, subtitle, and image/animation. Shows when a section has no data.

title.description: Placeholder title text or localization key.

subhead.description: Placeholder subtitle text or localization key.

notes: Has contentSlot 'items' for custom placeholder content.

description: Approval process list showing approval steps, statuses, and actions for a record. Extends DataGrid with WebSocket subscription.

recordId.description: Entity record ID binding for approval data and WebSocket subscription.

notes: Extends CrtDataGridComponent. Supports Filtration platform API.

description: Local time display component showing the current time in a specified timezone. Bound to a TimeZone lookup value.

control.description: Lookup value binding containing TimeZone information, e.g. '$TimeZone'.

notes: Requires a TimeZone lookup reference schema binding.

description: Multi-tab list component with search, paging, combined mode, and selectable items. Used for detail-like tabbed data views.

selectedItemId.description: ID of the currently selected item.

showNoDataBlankState.description: Show blank state when no data.
